sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Thrust Blocking
special_mechanics.description: Aggressive blocking system similar to Street Fighter III's Parry system; timing-based defensive mechanic optimized for online play via XBAND service

physics_values.parry_lag_compensation: Hand-tuned frame-by-frame collision detection using in-house 'Hero' tool

special_mechanics.name: Deflect Moves
special_mechanics.description: Counterattack maneuver available to each character; character-specific special technique

special_mechanics.name: Take Downs
special_mechanics.description: Special moves that knock opponents onto their back, enabling follow-up combo attacks while opponent is grounded

special_mechanics.name: Death Combos
special_mechanics.description: Fatality-style finishing combination attacks with gory visual effects; similar to Mortal Kombat fatalities

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. WeaponLord is a fighting game with minimal documented physics parameters. All movement data exists as game design concepts rather than numerical values. Development notes indicate frame-by-frame collision tuning and online lag compensation were prioritized, but specific physics values are not publicly documented. The game features character-specific move sets (9-12 special moves each) with distinct animation frames rather than shared physics templates.
